TAKEOUT
Offering more than just Great Food in Atlanta!
Bawarchi Biryanis isn't just about food. It's about the generations of chefs who kept the cooking traditions alive and are behind the delicious dishes we serve at our restaurant.
READ MORE
Reviews
"Food was so wonderful! I will definitely be back here again! Service was also perfect!"
-
Jonathan Hill
"This place serves great Indian and Chinese food. Like the taste of the food and their biryanis are just amazing. Like the atmosphere also. Great staff and plenty of parking. They have takeaway service separately."
-
Monalisa Das
"Wonderful food and lovely staff. My go-to comfort food joint. I have been eating here regularly for the past 12 years and the food has been consistently good if not better each year. Decent portion sizes and very flavorful. Definitely try this place if you are in the area or visiting out of town and want to visit a good Indian restaurant."
-
Sutanu Lahiri
"The best Indian restaurant in town, the best service I’ve ever received and amazing food!!"
-
Junaid Tahir

Over the last 10 years, Bawarchi Atlanta has become a beloved fixture in the heart of Sandy Springs. We have had the privilege of hosting countless family gatherings, community events, and celebrations fostering strong connections and creating memories with every meal.

Enjoy our delicious lunch combos featuring a delightful assortment of a perfect lunch meal. Includes Biryani, appetizer, curry, naan and a side of vegetable raita.

meta.meta_description: Best Indian Restaurant and Indian Catering in Sandy Springs serving delicious Indian food since 2014. Serving authentic Indian Curries, Authentic Biryanis, Indian Appetizers & Tandoor, Indian Chaat, Snacks and Indian Desserts.
